description: This little Orange tabby fits in the palm of the hand, she is full of beans which makes her super soft and squishy. Her fur is dark and light Orange tabby and she has a soft squishy white belly. This little cat has the cutest little smile which brings a smile to the face of everyone she meets. Palm Pals make great gifts for any occasion, Whether it is for A birthday, Christmas or as a just because gift, everyone will fall in love with this adorable palm pal Collect them all with 11 other adorable characters available.
